---
title: "Visibility and Communication - European Cohesion Policy in Online Media"
sort_year: 2019
year: "2019"
status: "Past"
funder: "European Parliament Tender (IP/B/REGO/IC/2019-009)"
categories: [Applied Political Communication, Past]
---

**Year:** 2019
**Status:** Past
**Funder:** European Parliament Tender (IP/B/REGO/IC/2019-009)
**Research Cluster:** Applied Political Communication
